caption: In an indoor basketball gym featuring a polished wood court with green and black painted sections, blue bleachers, and white walls, a man practices shooting. He is dressed in a pink sleeveless shirt and grey athletic shorts. Initially, the man stands near the center of the court, holding a basketball. He then tosses the ball upward into the air, stepping forward as he releases it. Following the release, he extends his right arm fully toward the ceiling in a follow-through motion. Finally, the man brings his arms back down to his sides, standing still and watching the trajectory of the ball. A basketball hoop with a white backboard and orange rim is visible in the background, as well as a second hoop positioned to the far left of the frame. No text or logos are visible.
